# Cortex — Cognitive Knowledge System

> Cortex is a persistent knowledge system for AI agents with formal ontology,
> reasoning, and intelligence serving. It uses OWL-RL, Oxigraph, SQLite FTS5,
> and hybrid retrieval to manage and serve knowledge objects.

## Tools

### cortex_search
Hybrid keyword + semantic + graph search. Returns ranked results.
- query (str, required): Search text
- doc_type (str): Filter by type
- project (str): Filter by project
- limit (int): Max results (default 20)

### cortex_context
Token-efficient briefing (summaries only). Use this for context injection.
- topic (str, required): Topic to query
- limit (int): Max results (default 10)

### cortex_dossier
Entity-centric intelligence brief with contradictions, timeline, related entities.
- topic (str, required): Entity name or topic

### cortex_read
Full document with content, metadata, and relationships.
- obj_id (str, required): Object ID

### cortex_capture
Create a knowledge object with optional auto-classification pipeline.
- title (str, required): Title
- content (str): Full text content
- obj_type (str): Type (decision, lesson, fix, session, research, source, synthesis, idea)
- project (str): Project name
- tags (str): Comma-separated tags
- template (str): Template name (session, fix, decision, lesson, research, idea)
- run_pipeline (bool): Run intelligence pipeline (default true)

### cortex_link
Create a typed relationship between two knowledge objects.
- from_id (str, required): Source object ID
- rel_type (str, required): causedBy, contradicts, supports, supersedes, dependsOn, implements
- to_id (str, required): Target object ID

### cortex_feedback
Provide explicit relevance feedback for retrieval learning.
- obj_id (str, required): Object ID
- relevant (bool): True if relevant (default true)

### cortex_graph
Get the knowledge graph around an object or entity.
- obj_id (str): Object ID
- entity (str): Entity name (alternative to obj_id)

### cortex_list
List knowledge objects with optional filters.
- doc_type (str): Filter by type
- project (str): Filter by project
- limit (int): Max results (default 50)

### cortex_status (admin)
Get health metrics, object counts, and active alerts.

### cortex_synthesize (admin)
Generate cross-document synthesis over a time period.
- period_days (int): Days to cover (default 7)
- project (str): Scope to project

### cortex_delete (admin)
Delete a knowledge object.
- obj_id (str, required): Object ID

### cortex_export (admin)
Export a knowledge object as markdown.
- obj_id (str, required): Object ID
- format (str): Export format (default markdown)

### cortex_safety_check (admin)
Review a destructive action before executing.
- action (str, required): Action description
- target (str, required): What will be affected

## Knowledge Types
decision, lesson, fix, session, research, source, synthesis, idea

## Relationship Types
causedBy, contradicts, supports, supersedes, dependsOn, ledTo, implements, mentions

## Best Practices
1. Use `cortex_context` for lightweight context injection (token-efficient)
2. Use `cortex_dossier` for deep research on an entity or topic
3. Use `cortex_capture` at the end of sessions to persist learnings
4. Use `cortex_link` to connect related objects (builds the graph)
5. Use `cortex_feedback` to improve future search results
